startups.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out

Forbes counted 45 new AI billionaires in its 2026 rankings alone, worth a combined $2.9 trillion, and that’s before either Anthropic or OpenAI has gone public. Rimer’s two paths, voluntary or forced, have precedent from the last time American wealth concentration reached this level.
